abort.already_configured: This Infrared Light is already configured.
abort.invalid_config_file: The configuration file is invalid. Please check the file and try again.
abort.no_infrared_emitters: No infrared emitters found. Please configure at least one infrared emitter and try again.

data_description.config_file: Select the configuration file for your infrared light. This file should contain the necessary information to control your light.
data_description.infrared_entity_id: Select the infrared emitter entity that will be used to control the light. This entity should be able to send infrared signals within range of the light.
